code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut in_num = false
  mut current = 0
  mut neg = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        current = 0
        neg = false
      end
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      current = 0
      neg = true
    else
      if in_num
        if neg
          current = -current
        end
        result = list.push(result, current)
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        current = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    result = insert_sorted(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let s1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let s2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(s1)
let b = parse_line(s2)
let common = sort_list(intersect(a, b))

if common.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in common
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
